title: coreopsis gladiata
intro: Coreopsis gladiata, also known as the tall tickseed, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis gladiata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
